project_name: 钠插层石墨烯界面 / Na-intercalated graphene interface
domain: computational materials science / 计算材料科学
summary: Resolve how Na intercalation changes interface structure and electronic properties / 阐明钠插层对界面结构和电子性质的影响
research_questions: Which intercalation sites are stable and experimentally plausible? / 哪些插层位点稳定且具有实验可实现性？

hypotheses.statement: Na intercalation decouples graphene from the substrate / 钠插层使石墨烯与衬底解耦
hypotheses.falsification: No reproducible reduction in interface coupling observables / 界面耦合表征量没有可重复降低

objectives.description: Compare candidate Na sites under converged settings / 在收敛参数下比较候选钠位点
objectives.success_criteria: All candidate structures use one validated calculation protocol / 所有候选结构使用同一套经验证的计算流程

models: Na-intercalated graphene interface candidate structures / 钠插层石墨烯界面候选结构
methods: VASP PBE relax -> SCF -> band/DOS / VASP PBE 优化到静态与电子结构
parameter_matrix: TBD convergence tests for ENCUT and KPOINTS / ENCUT 与 KPOINTS 收敛测试待定

vasp_workflow_envelope.incar_inheritance: SCF/band/DOS inherit reviewed electronic settings from the initial protocol unless listed in stage_overrides / 后续计算继承初始协议中的电子参数，除非在 stage_overrides 中列出
vasp_workflow_envelope.kpoints_policy: TBD meshes and band path before production / 生产计算前确定网格和能带路径
vasp_workflow_envelope.restart_link_policy: Use ln -s for SCF CHGCAR/WAVECAR in downstream tasks / 后续任务用 ln -s 链接 SCF 的 CHGCAR/WAVECAR

convergence: relax ionic convergence by parser/review before SCF / relax 经解析确认离子收敛后才进入 SCF
validation: Compare structural sanity and electronic outputs across candidates / 比较候选结构合理性与电子输出
stop_conditions: Stop if convergence/resource envelope is exceeded without review / 超出收敛或资源参数包时停止并复核
